Let's Do This

Book Your Event

Weekends fill up fast. Drop us your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours to confirm availability and talk through your party.

Prefer to text? Reach us at 312-414-9698

Two Vendors. One Booking.

One Setup Plan.

A DJ and a DSLR Photo Booth, booked together — so your party has music that moves people and prints they actually walk away with. Three DJs in rotation. Real camera. Real lighting. Real prints.

🎛️
$500
DJ Only
3 hours. Your kids will be on the floor. So will their parents.
  • Reads the room and adjusts on the fly
  • Curated for your specific crowd
  • Kid-appropriate clean edits
  • Request-driven, reads the room
📸
$600
Photo Booth Only
3 hours. Walk away with actual prints, not just a shared album link.
  • Real DSLR camera + flattering lighting
  • Custom theme-matched template
  • Onsite attendant
  • Digital gallery with hi-res images
🎛️📸
$800
DJ + Photo Booth Bundle
3 hours. One booking, two vendors, zero day-of chaos.
  • Live DJ set, curated for your crowd
  • DSLR Photo Booth with attendant
  • Custom print templates per event
  • Digital gallery included
Add-On

Party Photos & Social Reel

We capture photos and short video clips throughout the event and cut them into a social media reel. Not a full event photographer — this is us documenting the vibe as it happens.

$200add to any package
